name: Wake Word Detector (On-Device TFLite Micro)
description: On-device wake word detection using TFLite Micro on ESP32-S3. Runs inference every 20ms (< 10ms per inference on S3). Uses INMP441 mic input. Model in PSRAM (< 500KB). Custom wake words possible via openWakeWord training. Based on kahrendt/esphome-on-device-wake-word.

model_path.description: Path to TFLite model in SPIFFS/LittleFS
